[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101111 6
1 0000110 2
2 1101001 4
3 1110100 4
4 1010010 3
5 1001101 4
6 0011010 3
7 0110110 4

70 07 1111101 6
